name: Gooseberry Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the berries with 4 tablespoons of sugar until soft.
2. Pass the cooked berries through a fine disk of a food mill and let cool.
3. Beat the cream cheese with the remaining tablespoon of sugar until smooth.
4. Combine the cheese mixture with the gooseberry puree until fully amalgamated.
5. Beat in the heavy cream.
